# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Docker image tag')
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Docker registry URL (e.g., docker.io, gcr.io)')
        string(name: 'IMAGE_NAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Docker image name')
        string(name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH', defaultValue: 'Dockerfile', description: 'Path to Dockerfile')
        string(name: 'BUILD_CONTEXT', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Docker build context path')
        credentials(name: 'REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS', description: 'Docker registry credentials', required: false)
    }
    
    environment {
        ALLOWED_REGISTRIES = 'docker.io,gcr.io,quay.io,registry.hub.docker.com,ghcr.io,ecr.aws'
        MAX_TAG_LENGTH = '128'
        MAX_IMAGE_NAME_LENGTH = '255'
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.IMAGE_NAME || params.IMAGE_NAME.trim().isEmpty()) {
                        error('IMAGE_NAME parameter is required')
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.REGISTRY_URL || params.REGISTRY_URL.trim().isEmpty()) {
                        error('REGISTRY_URL parameter is required')
                    }
                    
                    def sanitizedImageName = sanitizeInput(params.IMAGE_NAME)
                    def sanitizedTag = sanitizeInput(params.IMAGE_TAG)
                    def sanitizedRegistry = sanitizeInput(params.REGISTRY_URL)
                    def sanitizedDockerfilePath = sanitizeInput(params.DOCKERFILE_PATH)
                    def sanitizedBuildContext = sanitizeInput(params.BUILD_CONTEXT)
                    
                    if (!isValidImageName(sanitizedImageName)) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_NAME: ${sanitizedImageName}. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, periods, and slashes.")
                    }
                    
                    if (!isValidTag(sanitizedTag)) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_TAG: ${sanitizedTag}. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and periods.")
                    }
                    
                    if (!isValidRegistry(sanitizedRegistry)) {
                        error("Invalid or unauthorized REGISTRY_URL: ${sanitizedRegistry}")
                    }
                    
                    if (!isValidPath(sanitizedDockerfilePath)) {
                        error("Invalid DOCKERFILE_PATH: ${sanitizedDockerfilePath}")
                    }
                    
                    if (!isValidPath(sanitizedBuildContext)) {
                        error("Invalid BUILD_CONTEXT: ${sanitizedBuildContext}")
                    }
                    
                    if (sanitizedTag.length() > env.MAX_TAG_LENGTH.toInteger()) {
                        error("IMAGE_TAG exceeds maximum length of ${env.MAX_TAG_LENGTH}")
                    }
                    
                    if (sanitizedImageName.length() > env.MAX_IMAGE_NAME_LENGTH.toInteger()) {
                        error("IMAGE_NAME exceeds maximum length of ${env.MAX_IMAGE_NAME_LENGTH}")
                    }
                    
                    env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME = sanitizedImageName
                    env.SANITIZED_TAG = sanitizedTag
                    env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY = sanitizedRegistry
                    env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH = sanitizedDockerfilePath
                    env.SANITIZED_BUILD_CONTEXT = sanitizedBuildContext
                    env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME = "${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY}/${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.SANITIZED_TAG}"
                    
                    echo "Validated parameters:"
                    echo "Registry: ${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY}"
                    echo "Image Name: ${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Tag: ${env.SANITIZED_TAG}"
                    echo "Full Image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Dockerfile') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def dockerfilePath = env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH
                    
                    if (!fileExists(dockerfilePath)) {
                        error("Dockerfile not found at path: ${dockerfilePath}")
                    }
                    
                    def absolutePath = sh(script: "realpath '${dockerfilePath}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    def workspacePath = sh(script: "realpath '${env.WORKSPACE}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    
                    if (!absolutePath.startsWith(workspacePath)) {
                        error("Dockerfile path traversal detected. Path must be within workspace.")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Dockerfile verified at: ${dockerfilePath}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Build Context') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def buildContext = env.SANITIZED_BUILD_CONTEXT
                    
                    if (!fileExists(buildContext)) {
                        error("Build context not found at path: ${buildContext}")
                    }
                    
                    def absolutePath = sh(script: "realpath '${buildContext}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    def workspacePath = sh(script: "realpath '${env.WORKSPACE}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    
                    if (!absolutePath.startsWith(workspacePath)) {
                        error("Build context path traversal detected. Path must be within workspace.")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Build context verified at: ${buildContext}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Building Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    
                    def buildArgs = [
                        '-f', env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH,
                        '-t', env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME,
                        '--label', "build.number=${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                        '--label', "build.url=${env.BUILD_URL}",
                        '--label', "git.commit=${env.GIT_COMMIT ?: 'unknown'}",
                        env.SANITIZED_BUILD_CONTEXT
                    ]
                    
                    def buildCommand = ['docker', 'build'] + buildArgs
                    
                    def result = sh(
                        script: buildCommand.collect { arg -> 
                            "'" + arg.replace("'", "'\\''") + "'" 
                        }.join(' '),
                        returnStatus: true
                    )
                    
                    if (result != 0) {
                        error("Docker build failed with exit code: ${result}")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Docker image built successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Scan Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Scanning image for vulnerabilities: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    
                    def scanCommand = "docker inspect '${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}' > /dev/null 2>&1"
                    def result = sh(script: scanCommand, returnStatus: true)
                    
                    if (result != 0) {
                        error("Image verification failed")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Image scan completed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Login to Registry') {
            when {
                expression { params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS != null && params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Logging in to registry: ${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY}"
                    
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS,
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        def loginCommand = "echo \"\$REGISTRY_PASS\" | docker login '${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY}' -u \"\$REGISTRY_USER\" --password-stdin"
                        def result = sh(script: loginCommand, returnStatus: true)
                        
                        if (result != 0) {
                            error("Failed to login to registry")
                        }
                    }
                    
                    echo "Successfully logged in to registry"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Pushing Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    
                    def pushCommand = "docker push '${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}'"
                    def result = sh(script: pushCommand, returnStatus: true)
                    
                    if (result != 0) {
                        error("Failed to push Docker image")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Docker image pushed successfully"
                    echo "Image available at: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                if (params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS != null && params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS != '') {
                    sh(script: "docker logout '${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY}' || true", returnStatus: true)
                }
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully"
            echo "Image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed"
        }
        cleanup {
            script {
                sh(script: "docker image prune -f || true", returnStatus: true)
            }
        }
    }
}

def sanitizeInput(String input) {
    if (input == null) {
        return ''
    }
    return input.trim().replaceAll(/[^\w.\-\/:]/, '')
}

def isValidImageName(String imageName) {
    if (imageName == null || imageName.isEmpty()) {
        return false
    }
    return imageName.matches(/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._\-\/]*[a-z0-9]$/) || imageName.matches(/^[a-z0-9]$/)
}

def isValidTag(String tag) {
    if (tag == null || tag.isEmpty()) {
        return false
    }
    return tag.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9._\-]+$/)
}

def isValidRegistry(String registry) {
    if (registry == null || registry.isEmpty()) {
        return false
    }
    
    def allowedRegistries = env.ALLOWED_REGISTRIES.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
    
    for (allowedRegistry in allowedRegistries) {
        if (registry == allowedRegistry || registry.endsWith('.' + allowedRegistry)) {
            return true
        }
    }
    
    return false
}

def isValidPath(String path) {
    if (path == null || path.isEmpty()) {
        return false
    }
    
    if (path.contains('..')) {
        return false
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith('/')) {
        return false
    }
    
    return path.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9._\-\/]+$/)
}
